title: Add Internet Identity Authentication

requirements.text: Integrate Internet Identity authentication into the frontend. Add a login/logout button in the sidebar or header using the existing useInternetIdentity hook. When logged out, display a login prompt or restrict access to authenticated users only. When logged in, show the user's principal or a welcome indicator and a logout button.
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Login with Internet Identity' button is visible when the user is not authenticated.
Clicking the login button opens the Internet Identity authentication flow.
After successful login, the user's authenticated state is reflected in the UI (e.g., principal shown or welcome message).
A 'Logout' button is available when the user is authenticated.
Clicking logout clears the session and returns the user to the unauthenticated state.
The useActor hook uses the authenticated identity so backend calls are made on behalf of the logged-in principal.
The existing useInternetIdentity hook and useActor hook are used without modification.

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts — compose them as-is.
Authentication must use Internet Identity only — no third-party auth providers.
nonGoals: Per-user data isolation or separate data namespaces in the backend.
Role-based access control or admin vs. regular user distinctions.
